# v5.1 per-block dataset gap manifest

Generated once at the freeze from `pipeline/datasets/derived/` and
`targets.json` (Setup dataset gate). Informational — the frozen finalizer
handles every gap by injecting MISSING; codes listed here can produce no
base score for the affected factor and route to STRESS_TEST_ONLY /
EVIDENCE_FIRST. `labor_share > 1` anomalies stay raw (the factor cap
absorbs them).
